pi_items.source: setup_task.sh dynamically injects 'EMBARGOED' into the Subject header.
setup_task.sh modifies exactly the first 3 emails (if i < 3). A grep of the SpamAssassin corpus confirms no other emails natively contain the word 'EMBARGOED'.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on 50 real emails from the SpamAssassin Public Corpus imported into the Thunderbird Inbox. The setup script dynamically prepends 'EMBARGOED: ' to the subjects of exactly the first 3 emails. No other emails naturally contain this keyword.
